title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: The Kalshi Story profiles founders Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, who built a regulated financial exchange for real-world event markets. After years of regulatory battles including litigation against government oversight, Kalshi achieved a $22 billion valuation and massive user and volume scale.
